items.title: Zoom Strategy: Case Study
items.description: Applied Porter's Five Forces and strategic analysis to recommend actions that strengthen Zoom's competitive position.

items.title: Distributor and Retail Performance Tracking System
items.description: Designed a system approach to monitor where and how product is selling for a fast-growing craft beverage brand.

items.title: Automating Processes for Parachute Riggers with the DOD
items.description: Evaluated four courses of action and delivered an ROI-oriented recommendation for process improvement.

items.title: Vehicle Fleet Optimization Analysis
items.description: Used quantitative analysis to optimize fleet sizing and improve operations for the Division of Information Technology.

items.title: Business Intelligence for Terrapin Trust
items.description: Built MySQL and Tableau-driven reporting workflows to improve account management, agent visibility, and transaction tracking.

items.title: Marketing Analytics for Office of Executive Education
items.description: Converted enrollment and lead analysis into web and campaign recommendations to improve lead-to-purchase conversion.

items.title: Product Development for Cats Tongue Start-Up
items.description: Collaborated on market analysis, competitive positioning, and prototype planning for a consumer pet-hair solution concept.
